patches.hypothesis: The refined patch resolves the overfitting issue by using a more robust way to handle the index out of bounds exception and adding more test cases to cover different scenarios. It also addresses the root cause by adding a null check and handling edge cases.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by an index out of bounds exception when trying to access the `values` array with an index that is outside the bounds of the array. This is due to the `Integer.valueOf` method returning an Integer that is larger than the size of the `values` array. The solution is to add a check to ensure that the index is within the bounds of the array before trying to access it.
